pve_actions.name: Slice
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 420.
Additional Effect: Increases Soul Gauge by 10

pve_actions.name: Waxing Slice
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 260.
Combo Action: Slice
Combo Potency: 500
Combo Bonus: Increases Soul Gauge by 10

pve_actions.name: Shadow of Death
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 300.
Additional Effect: Afflicts target with Death's Design, increasing damage you deal target by 10%
Duration: 30s
Extends duration of Death's Design by 30s to a maximum of 60s.
Additional Effect: Increases Soul Gauge by 10 if target is KO'd before effect expires

pve_actions.name: Harpe
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 300.
Additional Effect: Increases Soul Gauge by 10

pve_actions.name: Hell's Ingress
pve_actions.effect:
Quickly dash 15 yalms forward.
Additional Effect: Grants Enhanced Harpe
Enhanced Harpe Effect: Next Harpe can be cast immediately and will reduce recast timer of Hell's Ingress by 5s upon execution
Duration: 10s
Additional Effect: Leaves behind a Hellsgate at point of origin, and grants Threshold to self
Duration: 10s
Cannot be executed while bound.
Shares a recast timer with Hell's Egress.

pve_actions.name: Hell's Egress
pve_actions.effect:
Quickly dash 15 yalms backwards.
Additional Effect: Grants Enhanced Harpe
Enhanced Harpe Effect: Next Harpe can be cast immediately and will reduce recast timer of Hell's Egress by 5s upon execution
Duration: 10s
Additional Effect: Leaves behind a Hellsgate at point of origin, and grants Threshold to self
Duration: 10s
Cannot be executed while bound.
Shares a recast timer with Hell's Ingress.

pve_actions.name: Spinning Scythe
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 140 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Increases Soul Gauge by 10

pve_actions.name: Infernal Slice
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 280.
Combo Action: Waxing Slice
Combo Potency: 600
Combo Bonus: Increases Soul Gauge by 10

pve_actions.name: Whorl of Death
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Afflicts target with Death's Design, increasing damage you deal target by 10%
Duration: 30s
Extends duration of Death's Design by 30s to a maximum of 60s.
Additional Effect: Increases Soul Gauge by 10 if target is KO'd before effect expires

pve_actions.name: Arcane Crest
pve_actions.effect:
Grants Crest of Time Borrowed to self, creating a barrier that nullifies damage totaling up to 10% of maximum HP.
Duration: 5s
Grants Crest of Time Returned to self and nearby party members within a radius of 15 yalms when barrier is completely absorbed.
Crest of Time Returned Effect: Gradually restores HP
Cure Potency: 50
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Nightmare Scythe
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 120 to all nearby enemies.
Combo Action: Spinning Scythe
Combo Potency: 180
Combo Bonus: Increases Soul Gauge by 10

pve_actions.name: Blood Stalk
pve_actions.effect:
Summons your avatar to deliver an attack with a potency of 340.
Additional Effect: Grants Soul Reaver
Duration: 30s
Stack count will be reduced to 1 when already under the effect of Soul Reaver.
Effect cannot be stacked with Executioner.
Soul Gauge Cost: 50
Shares a recast timer with all avatar attacks except Gluttony.

pve_actions.name: Grim Swathe
pve_actions.effect:
Summons your avatar to deliver an attack with a potency of 140 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Additional Effect: Grants Soul Reaver
Duration: 30s
Stack count will be reduced to 1 when already under the effect of Soul Reaver.
Effect cannot be stacked with Executioner.
Soul Gauge Cost: 50
Shares a recast timer with all avatar attacks except Gluttony.

pve_actions.name: Soul Slice
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 520.
Additional Effect: Increases Soul Gauge by 50
Maximum Charges: 2
Shares a recast timer with Soul Scythe.
Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.

pve_actions.name: Soul Scythe
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 180 to all nearby enemies.
Additional Effect: Increases Soul Gauge by 50
Maximum Charges: 2
Shares a recast timer with Soul Slice.
Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.

pve_actions.name: Gibbet
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 500.
560 when executed from a target's flank.
Enhanced Gibbet Potency: 560
Flank Enhanced Potency: 620
Additional Effect: Grants Enhanced Gallows
Duration: 60s
The action Blood Stalk changes to Unveiled Gallows while under the effect of Enhanced Gallows.
Additional Effect: Increases Shroud Gauge by 10
Can only be executed while under the effect of Soul Reaver.

pve_actions.name: Gallows
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 500.
560 when executed from a target's rear.
Enhanced Gallows Potency: 560
Rear Enhanced Potency: 620
Additional Effect: Grants Enhanced Gibbet
Duration: 60s
The action Blood Stalk changes to Unveiled Gibbet while under the effect of Enhanced Gibbet.
Additional Effect: Increases Shroud Gauge by 10
Can only be executed while under the effect of Soul Reaver.

pve_actions.name: Guillotine
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 200 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Additional Effect: Increases Shroud Gauge by 10
Can only be executed while under the effect of Soul Reaver.

pve_actions.name: Unveiled Gibbet
pve_actions.effect:
Summons your avatar to deliver an attack with a potency of 440.
Additional Effect: Grants Soul Reaver
Duration: 30s
Stack count will be reduced to 1 when already under the effect of Soul Reaver.
Effect cannot be stacked with Executioner.
Soul Gauge Cost: 50
Can only be executed while under the effect of Enhanced Gibbet.
Shares a recast timer with all avatar attacks except Gluttony.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Blood Stalk changes to Unveiled Gibbet when under the effect of Enhanced Gibbet.

pve_actions.name: Unveiled Gallows
pve_actions.effect:
Summons your avatar to deliver an attack with a potency of 440.
Additional Effect: Grants Soul Reaver
Duration: 30s
Stack count will be reduced to 1 when already under the effect of Soul Reaver.
Effect cannot be stacked with Executioner.
Soul Gauge Cost: 50
Can only be executed while under the effect of Enhanced Gallows.
Shares a recast timer with all avatar attacks except Gluttony.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Blood Stalk changes to Unveiled Gallows while under the effect of Enhanced Gallows.

pve_actions.name: Arcane Circle
pve_actions.effect:
Increases damage dealt by self and nearby party members by 3%.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Grants Circle of Sacrifice to self and nearby party members
Duration: 5s
Additional Effect: Grants Bloodsown Circle to self
Duration: 6s
Circle of Sacrifice Effect: When you or party members under this effect successfully land a weaponskill or ability, or cast a spell, the reaper who applied it may be granted a stack of Immortal Sacrifice, up to a maximum of 8
Duration: 30s
Bloodsown Circle Effect: Allows you to accumulate stacks of Immortal Sacrifice from party members under the effect of your Circle of Sacrifice

pve_actions.name: Regress
pve_actions.effect:
Move instantly to the Hellsgate left behind by you.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Threshold.
Cannot be executed while bound.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Hell's Ingress or Hell's Egress will change to Regress when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Gluttony
pve_actions.effect:
Summons your avatar to deal unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 560 for the first enemy, and 25% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants 2 stacks of Executioner
Duration: 30s
Effect cannot be stacked with Soul Reaver.
Soul Gauge Cost: 50

pve_actions.name: Enshroud
pve_actions.effect:
Offers your flesh as a vessel to your avatar, gaining maximum stacks of Lemure Shroud.
Duration: 30s
Certain actions cannot be executed while playing host to your avatar.
Additional Effect: Grants Oblatio
Duration: 30s
Shroud Gauge Cost: 50

pve_actions.name: Void Reaping
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 580.
Enhanced Void Reaping Potency: 640
Additional Effect: Grants Enhanced Cross Reaping
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants Void Shroud
Can only be executed while under the effect of Enshrouded.
Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.
Lemure Shroud Cost: 1
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Gibbet changes to Void Reaping when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Cross Reaping
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 580.
Enhanced Cross Reaping Potency: 640
Additional Effect: Grants Enhanced Void Reaping
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants Void Shroud
Can only be executed while under the effect of Lemure Shroud.
Lemure Shroud Cost: 1
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Gallows changes to Cross Reaping when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Grim Reaping
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 220 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Additional Effect: Grants Void Shroud
Can only be executed while under the effect of Enshrouded.
Lemure Shroud Cost: 1
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Guillotine changes to Grim Reaping when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Soulsow
pve_actions.effect:
Grants Soulsow to self, changing the action to Harvest Moon.
Cast time is instant when used outside of battle.

pve_actions.name: Harvest Moon
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 800 for the first enemy, and 40% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Increases Soul Gauge by 10
Can only be executed while under the effect of Soulsow.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Soulsow changes to Harvest Moon when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Lemure's Slice
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 280.
Void Shroud Cost: 2
Shares a recast timer with Lemure's Scythe.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Blood Stalk changes to Lemure's Slice while under the effect of Enshrouded.

pve_actions.name: Lemure's Scythe
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 100 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Void Shroud Cost: 2
Shares a recast timer with Lemure's Slice.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Grim Swathe changes to Lemure's Scythe while under the effect of Enshrouded.

pve_actions.name: Plentiful Harvest
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to all enemies in a straight line before you with a potency of 720 for the first enemy, and 20% less for all remaining enemies.
Immortal Sacrifice Cost: 1 stack
Potency increases up to 1,000 as stacks of Immortal Sacrifice exceed minimum cost.
Additional Effect: Grants Ideal Host
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants Perfectio Occulta
Perfectio Occulta Effect: Grants Perfectio Parata upon executing Communio
Duration: 30s
Cannot be executed while under the effect of Bloodsown Circle.
Consumes all stacks of Immortal Sacrifice upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Communio
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 1,100 for the first enemy, and 20% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants Perfectio Parata when executed while Perfectio Occulta is active
Duration: 30s
Enshrouded effect expires upon execution.
Requires at least one stack of Lemure Shroud to execute.

pve_actions.name: Sacrificium
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 700 for the first enemy, and 20% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Enshrouded and Oblatio.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Gluttony changes to Sacrificium when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Executioner's Gibbet
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 700.
760 when executed from a target's flank.
Enhanced Gibbet Potency: 760
Flank Enhanced Potency: 820
Additional Effect: Grants Enhanced Gallows
Duration: 60s
The action Blood Stalk changes to Unveiled Gallows while under the effect of Enhanced Gallows.
Additional Effect: Increases Shroud Gauge by 10
Can only be executed while under the effect of Executioner.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Gibbet changes to Executioner's Gibbet when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Executioner's Gallows
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 700.
760 when executed from a target's rear.
Enhanced Gallows Potency: 760
Rear Enhanced Potency: 820

The action Blood Stalk changes to Unveiled Gibbet while under the effect of Enhanced Gibbet.
Additional Effect: Increases Shroud Gauge by 10
Can only be executed while under the effect of Executioner.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Gallows changes to Executioner's Gallows when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Executioner's Guillotine
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack with a potency of 260 to all enemies in a cone before you.
Additional Effect: Increases Shroud Gauge by 10
Can only be executed while under the effect of Executioner.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Guillotine changes to Executioner's Guillotine when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Perfectio
pve_actions.effect:
Delivers an attack to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 1,300 for the first enemy, and 20% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Perfectio Parata.

â€»This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
â€»Communio changes to Perfectio when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Second Wind
pve_actions.effect:
Instantly restores own HP.
Cure Potency: 800

pve_actions.name: Leg Sweep
pve_actions.effect:
Stuns target.
Duration: 3s

pve_actions.name: Bloodbath
pve_actions.effect:
Converts a portion of physical damage dealt into HP.
Duration: 20s

pve_actions.name: Feint
pve_actions.effect:
Lowers target's physical damage dealt by 10% and magic damage dealt by 5%.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Arm's Length
pve_actions.effect:
Nullifies most knockback and draw-in effects.
Duration: 6s
Additional Effect: When you are struck by a physical attack, the striker will be afflicted with Slow +20%
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: True North
pve_actions.effect:
Nullifies all action direction requirements.
Duration: 10s
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Soul Gauge
traits.effect: Allows for Soul Gauge accumulation upon the landing of certain weaponskills and magic actions, or defeating enemies under the effect of Death's Design.

traits.name: Melee Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Slice to 300, Waxing Slice to 140, Shadow of Death to 300, Harpe to 300, Spinning Scythe to 140, Infernal Slice to 140, Whorl of Death to 100, and Nightmare Scythe to 120.

traits.name: Enhanced Avatar
traits.effect:
Grants the effect of Soul Reaver upon successfully landing Blood Stalk or Grim Swathe.
Duration: 30s
Effect ends upon execution of any weaponskill or magic attack.

traits.name: Hellsgate
traits.effect:
Upon executing Hell's Ingress or Hell's Egress, leave behind a Hellsgate and grant Threshold to self.
Duration: 10s
Hell's Ingress changes to Regress after executing Hell's Egress, and vice versa.

traits.name: Tempered Soul
traits.effect:
Allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Soul Slice and Soul Scythe.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Shroud Gauge
traits.effect: Allows for Shroud Gauge accumulation upon the landing of Gibbet, Gallows, or Guillotine.

traits.name: Enhanced Arcane Crest
traits.effect:
Grants Crest of Time Returned to self and nearby party members, gradually restoring HP over time. This effect is only granted when the Crest of Time Borrowed barrier is completely absorbed.
Cure Potency: 50
Duration: 15s

traits.name: Melee Mastery II
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Slice to 320, Waxing Slice to 160, and Infernal Slice to 180.

traits.name: Void Soul
traits.effect: Grants Void Shroud upon landing Void Reaping, Cross Reaping, or Grim Reaping.

traits.name: Enhanced Arcane Circle
traits.effect:
Grants Circle of Sacrifice to you and nearby party members upon executing Arcane Circle.
Duration: 5s
When you or party members under this effect successfully land a weaponskill or cast a spell, you may gain a stack of Immortal Sacrifice, up to a maximum of 8.
Duration: 30s
Also grants Bloodsown Circle to self, allowing you to receive stacks of Immortal Sacrifice from party members under the effect of your Circle of Sacrifice.
Duration: 6s

traits.name: Enhanced Enshroud
traits.effect:
Grants Oblatio upon executing Enshroud.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Melee Mastery III
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Slice to 420, Waxing Slice to 260, Infernal Slice to 280, Soul Slice to 520, Gibbet to 500, Gallows to 500, Unveiled Gibbet to 440, Unveiled Gallows to 440, Void Reaping to 580, Cross Reaping to 580, Harvest Moon to 800, and Lemure's Slice to 280.

traits.name: Enhanced Gluttony
traits.effect:
Grants 2 stacks of Executioner upon executing Gluttony.
Duration: 30s
Effect cannot be stacked with Soul Reaver.
Effect ends upon execution of any weaponskill or magic attack.
Gibbet changes to Executioner's Gibbet, Gallows changes to Executioner's Gallows, and Guillotine changes to Executioner's Guillotine while under the effect of Executioner.

traits.name: Enhanced Plentiful Harvest
traits.effect:
Grants Perfectio Occulta upon executing Plentiful Harvest.
Duration: 30s
Perfectio Occulta changes to Perfectio Parata upon executing Communio.
Effect of Perfectio Parata ends upon gaining the effect of Lemure Shroud.

traits.name: Enhanced Second Wind
traits.effect: Increases the healing potency of Second Wind to 800.

traits.name: Enhanced Feint
traits.effect: Extends the duration of Feint to 15 seconds.
